# HowardTech

> HowardTech is a software consultancy that delivers custom applications, legacy modernization, and cloud infrastructure through an orchestrated workforce of AI agents spanning the full software development lifecycle. Senior human engineers steer the agents, compressing delivery from weeks to days without giving up control, quality, or security.

HowardTech sells agent-driven software delivery: a team of specialized AI agents handles discovery, architecture, implementation, review, testing, security, DevOps, and monitoring, while human architects set the guardrails and own the outcome.

- Website: https://howardtech.solutions
- Contact email: info@howardtech.solutions
- Offices: Chicago, IL and Des Moines, IA, USA
- Availability: Open for Q3 engagements

## Services

- **Custom App Development** — Greenfield web and mobile applications built on modern, cloud-native foundations. Agent-assisted pipelines deliver production-grade features at a fraction of the usual timeline.
- **Legacy Modernization** — Systematic refactoring of monolithic codebases. Agents map dependencies, untangle coupling, and migrate systems with minimal disruption.
- **API & Integration Engineering** — Robust APIs and third-party integrations, with documented contracts for long-term maintainability.
- **Automated QA & Testing** — Unit, integration, and end-to-end coverage generated and maintained by dedicated testing agents.
- **DevOps & CI/CD Automation** — Self-healing pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, and zero-downtime deployments from commit to production.
- **Cloud & Infrastructure** — Elastic, observable environments with automated scaling, cost controls, and resilient multi-region architecture.
- **Code Review & Refactoring** — Continuous, agent-driven review that enforces standards and reduces technical debt.
- **Data & Analytics Platforms** — Pipelines, warehouses, and dashboards that turn raw data into decisions.
- **Security & Compliance Engineering** — Zero-trust architecture, automated dependency auditing, and traceable change history.
- **Technical Architecture & Advisory** — Senior architects who design the system, set standards, and lead the agent workforce.

## The agent workforce

- **Scout** — Discovery & Requirements: translates business goals into a precise, agent-ready backlog.
- **Atlas** — Architecture & Design: designs the system blueprint and selects the stack and guardrails.
- **Forge** — Implementation: builds features in parallel against the blueprint at agent speed.
- **Lens** — Code Review: audits every change for correctness, standards, and technical debt.
- **Probe** — QA & Testing: generates and maintains unit, integration, and end-to-end coverage.
- **Aegis** — Security & Compliance: hardens releases with zero-trust defaults and dependency auditing.
- **Relay** — DevOps & Delivery: owns CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, and zero-downtime deployment.
- **Pulse** — Reliability & Monitoring: instruments, observes, and self-heals in production.

## Delivery process

1. **Discovery & Scoping** — define objectives and translate them into an agent-ready backlog.
2. **Architecture & Planning** — design the blueprint, choose the stack, set guardrails and review gates.
3. **Agent-Assisted Build** — parallel agent chains implement features while engineers steer and unblock.
4. **Review & Hardening** — automated tests and human audits verify correctness, security, and performance.
5. **Deployment & Integration** — ship to your environment with automated CI/CD and system integration.
6. **Monitoring & Iteration** — instrument, observe, and continuously improve against your roadmap.

## Industries served

Fintech & Banking, Healthcare & Life Sciences, Retail & E-commerce, SaaS & Technology, Logistics & Supply Chain, Public Sector & Enterprise.

## Core technologies

TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Docker.

## Contact

- Email: info@howardtech.solutions
- Offices: Chicago, IL; Des Moines, IA (USA)
- Website: https://howardtech.solutions
